def test_broken_ts_omits_tags_key():
        with open(BROKEN_PATH) as f:
            content = f.read()
        cleaned = _strip_ts_comments(content)
        # Find the object literal passed into the declare call.
        match = re.search(
            r"type\.declare\s*<\s*Product\s*>\s*\(\s*\)\s*\(\s*(\{.*?\})\s*\)",
            cleaned,
            flags=re.DOTALL,
        )
